desc: Commit and organize the partly-uncommitted t6040 DT state in ~/Code/linux on yuka's feature/m4-m5-minimal-device-trees (AGENTS.md repos table; DEVLOG BUILD GOTCHA: kbuild uses committed code + copied DT files only, so uncommitted state is a loss risk), then draft an upstream-shaped DT series (t6040.dtsi, t6040-pmgr.dtsi, j614s board files, Mac16,8 compatible) with dtbs_check/checkpatch validation, coordinated with yuka — extend her branch, don't fork (ROADMAP Stage C device trees)
author: fable
